steps.title: Fit the line of best fit
steps.content: Use two points on the line of best fit, approximately $(0,1)$ and $(1800,16)$. These are model points on the fitted line, so they are appropriate for predicting the value at another $x$-coordinate.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: The predicted value is $11$, which matches choice C. Choice A corresponds to a larger $x$-value, choice B is too high for $x=1200$, and choice D is too low.
